steps.content: The equation $5.48x + 7.30y = 1{,}277.94$ models total revenue: each term is (price per unit) times (number of units sold). The variable $x$ is the number of smaller containers sold.

In the term $5.48x$, the coefficient 5.48 is multiplied by $x$ (number of smaller containers). That coefficient is the price per smaller container — a fixed dollar amount, not an expression involving a variable.

Evaluate every choice:
  • A: $5.48$ — This is the coefficient of $x$, so it represents the price per smaller container. That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
  • B: $7.30y$ — This is the entire revenue from larger containers, not the price per smaller container. Eliminated.
  • C: $7.30$ — This is the price per larger container, not the smaller one. Eliminated.
  • D: $5.48x$ — This is the total revenue from smaller containers, not the price of each one. Eliminated.
